description: The TC has received the preliminary title report and must review it for any issues or exceptions.

nodes.task_description: Scan the report for any liens, encumbrances, or easements that might affect the property.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the report and identifies a mechanic's lien from a previous contractor.

nodes.task_description: Send the report to the buyer's agent for their review.

expected_outcome.value: The full report is forwarded to the agent.

nodes.task_description: Notify the listing agent and title company about the identified lien and ask how it will be cleared before closing.

expected_outcome.value: The TC communicates the issue to the relevant parties to ensure it is resolved.
